hero.name: Fatih Çakır
hero.title: Backend Engineer & AI Developer
hero.subtitle: Building scalable systems at the intersection of backend, AI & DevOps.

about.heading: A bit about me
about.bio_1: I'm a Software Engineering graduate from Eastern Mediterranean University — an ABET-accredited, English-medium program on a full scholarship (January 2026). I specialise in backend development with .NET, but my real passion lies in building intelligent systems — where backend engineering meets AI and DevOps.
about.bio_2: I led the AI & Backend development of our faculty's 1st-place graduation project: an AI-integrated market price comparison platform for Cyprus, powered by RAG architecture, fuzzy search algorithms, and a smart basket optimizer. Prior to that, I completed two industry internships — deploying a real-time YOLOv8 computer vision system at Bursa Çimento, and building an inventory management system at TOFAŞ.
about.bio_3: I'm actively looking for opportunities where I can grow across the full backend-to-AI-to-DevOps spectrum. Let's build something great.
about.education: BSc Software Engineering — EMU · ABET Accredited · Full Scholarship

market.title: AI Integrated Market Price Comparison
market.description: Led the AI & Backend development of a Cyprus grocery price comparison platform — web scraping aggregates real-time prices from multiple supermarkets, while a RAG-powered AI assistant and smart basket optimizer help users find the best deals.
market.long_description: Faculty 1st place graduation project at Eastern Mediterranean University. As team lead for AI & Backend, I architected the .NET 8 REST API, implemented fuzzy product matching using Levenshtein Distance, built the smart basket optimization algorithm to find the cheapest market combination for a given shopping list, and integrated the RAG-based AI chat pipeline for natural language price queries. The system was designed with Agile sprints across 8 work packages, tested with Selenium, JMeter and Postman, and follows OWASP Top 10 security standards.

conveyor.title: YOLOv8 Conveyor Overflow Detection
conveyor.description: A real-time computer vision system deployed at Bursa Çimento to detect material overflow on conveyor belts, preventing equipment damage and safety hazards.
conveyor.long_description: Developed during my internship at Bursa Çimento, this system uses YOLOv8 to monitor conveyor belts in real-time via camera feeds. When overflow or anomalies are detected, the system triggers automated alerts to prevent costly equipment damage and safety incidents. This was my first hands-on experience with industrial-scale computer vision deployment.

tofas.title: TOFAŞ Spare Parts Inventory Control
tofas.description: An internal inventory management system built during my internship at TOFAŞ Türk Otomobil Fabrikası A.Ş., one of Turkey's largest automotive manufacturers, for tracking spare parts stock.
tofas.long_description: During my internship at TOFAŞ Türk Otomobil Fabrikası A.Ş., I developed an internal web application for managing spare parts inventory across the production line. The system handles full CRUD operations, stock level tracking, low-stock alerts, and reporting dashboards. Built with .NET Core and Entity Framework Core, with automated database migrations via SQLite.

wala.title: WALA — WhatsApp Like Application
wala.description: A secure real-time messaging application built with WebSockets as part of a security engineering course. Features encrypted client-server communication.
wala.long_description: Built for a security engineering course, WALA is a full-stack messaging application demonstrating secure WebSocket communication patterns. The project focused on security protocols, message integrity, authentication, and real-time bidirectional communication between multiple clients through a central server — similar to WhatsApp's architecture.

grad.role: Software Engineering Graduate — Team Lead, AI & Backend
grad.company: Eastern Mediterranean University · ABET Accredited · Faculty 1st Place 🏆
grad.description: Graduated with full scholarship from an English-medium, ABET-accredited program with the faculty's top-ranked graduation project: an AI-integrated market price comparison platform. Led a 4-person team as AI & Backend engineer, delivering a full-stack system with RAG architecture, fuzzy search, and smart basket optimization. EMU is ranked among the top universities in the Middle East & Central Asia (QS World Rankings).

bursa.description: Developed and deployed a real-time conveyor belt overflow detection system using YOLOv8 computer vision, reducing the risk of equipment damage on the production line.

tofas.description: Built an internal spare parts inventory management system using .NET Core and Entity Framework at TOFAŞ.

contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.subtitle: I'm actively looking for new opportunities. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, my inbox is always open.
